spec_match.rationale: The lab now probes the current alpha(from <color> / <alpha-value>) grammar with computed-style checks where needed, confirms the obsolete comma form is rejected, and dynamically applies either native alpha() or an rgba fallback.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive with color pickers, text inputs, and range sliders that update capability probes and the preview live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the purpose of a compatibility lab, detailing progressive enhancement and JS fallback patterns.

edge_cases.rationale: Exemplary handling of edge cases: it explicitly detects lack of support, applies a fallback, and provides visual feedback on the fallback path taken.

references.rationale: The concept page now links directly to both the ChromeStatus entry and the CSS Color 5 alpha() section.

design_system.rationale: Follows the design system styles, grid layout, and typography.

summary: Updated compatibility probes and examples to the current CSS Color 5 alpha(from color / percentage) grammar, replaced syntax-only false positives with computed-style probes, and added the concept-level ChromeStatus reference.
